raw:
## Completed
Implemented the Foreman live widget panel and session-aware dashboard updates.

Recon anchors: pure reader/statusline code is in `reader.ts:346`, `reader.ts:375`, `reader.ts:567`, `reader.ts:746`; dashboard TUI/session work is in `view.ts:156`, `view.ts:470`; shortcut/widget wiring is in `index.ts:976`, `index.ts:991`, `index.ts:1084`; old Phase C footer spec is at `DASHBOARD-SPEC.md:183`.

## Files Changed
- `extensions/foreman/dashboard/reader.ts` - enriched live task model, capped transcript-derived live info, `formatStatusPanel`, `sortForPicker`.
- `extensions/foreman/dashboard/view.ts` - session owner badges, mine-only filter, picker sorting, enriched live agent header.
- `extensions/foreman/index.ts` - dashboard receives sessionId; statusline replaced with `setWidget(..., { placement: "aboveEditor" })`.
- `extensions/foreman/dashboard/test/reader_test.sh` - added assertions for enrichment, panel formatting, session scoping, picker sorting.

## How To Verify
```bash
grep -q "claude-opus-4-8:xhigh" extensions/foreman/crew/planner.md && bash extensions/foreman/test/planner_timeout_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/test/planner_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/test/gates_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/test/reviewer_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/test/guard_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/test/fallback_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/test/ledger_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/dashboard/test/reader_test.sh
```

## Notes
Ran the full command above successfully. Pre-existing unrelated working-tree changes were left untouched.
